chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 713 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.414/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.415/2026 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.416/2026 (R/Surety) 26.01.2026 Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Shah, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety documents. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Fayaz Ahmed alias Fayaz, Majid Ali alias Goshoo and Ishaque were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 16.10.2023, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing three original special savings certificates amounting to Rs.50,000/- each. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 26.02.2024. Subsequently, the accused have been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the judgment dated 10.12.2025, annexed with this application. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, learned Assistant Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
